embed.alt: A high-energy, funny Japanese TV commercial for 「サトー咳止めドロップ」(Sato Cough Drops), styled like modern Japanese variety-show ads. Opens with a sudden comedic cough in total silence—WHAM smash cut to a colorful, hyper-expressive cute mascot (round, overconfident, slightly unhinged) popping into frame with exaggerated motion lines. Rapid-fire montage: office worker coughing during a meeting, ramen shop chef coughing over steaming noodles, schoolgirl coughing on a train platform. Final 2 seconds: clean, heroic product shot on a bright background, mascot strikes a triumphant pose, bold Japanese title slams on screen: 「サトー咳止めドロップ」, followed by a cheerful spoken tagline in Japanese as the music hits a cute final note.
